ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XX-Small, X-Small, Small) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size (e.g., 38, 40, 42) */,
  "size_status" TEXT /* Status of the size chart (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "brand_status" TEXT /* Status of the brand (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart entry */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the clothing item's image */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the clothing item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the clothing item (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each clothing category
URL of an image representing the category
Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive)
Unique identifier for each measurement type
Status of the measurement type (e.g., active, inactive)
Unique identifier for each size chart entry

Status of the size chart (e.g., active, inactive)
Status of the brand (e.g., active, inactive)
